business.summary: The latest escalation has raised fresh concerns over regional stability, with diplomatic efforts and nuclear talks facing new uncertainty.

business.title: Shree Refrigerations opens new Karad facility to boost defence HVAC manufacturing
business.summary: The facility will enhance efficiency, reduce supply chain delays, and support defence manufacturing under the Make in India initiative while contributing to local employment and industrial ecosystem development.

business.summary: Rijiju defended the project, alleging opposition to India’s growth, highlighted economic resilience, dismissed fake news, and said the islands are key to Viksit Bharat 2047

business.summary: New platform to leverage advanced analytics and cybersecurity frameworks

business.title: PM Modi unveils infrastructure push in West Bengal, releases 23rd PM-KISAN instalment
business.summary: In West Bengal alone, ₹907.21 crore was credited to 45.35 lakh beneficiaries, taking the State’s cumulative disbursement to over ₹15,055 crore since 2019

business.title: AP CM releases ₹3,125 crore to farmers under PM-Kisan Annadatha Sukhibhava
business.summary: The financial assistance, part of the Kharif 2026 support, provides ₹7,000 per farmer in the first instalment of the state’s annual ₹20,000 aid promise

business.title: Warsh's gamble: A quieter Federal Reserve could mean volatile markets, higher rates
business.summary: New Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh is significantly reducing the central bank's communication, particularly "forward guidance" on interest rates. This move, aimed at making markets less reliant on Fed signals, has already caused market volatility. Analysts warn this could lead to higher borrowing costs for consumers and businesses, contrasting with previous chairs who used guidance to stabilize markets and lower rates.

business.title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: Lower volatility signals calm, but resistance looms large
business.summary: Indian markets concluded the week on a strong note, driven by consistent buying interest and a significant drop in volatility. The Nifty index, while trading within a defined range, showed resilience by defending key support levels. However, a formidable resistance zone overhead suggests a cautious approach. Investors are advised to focus on stock-specific opportunities and avoid aggressive positions until a clear breakout occurs.

business.title: Sun Pharma adds Innovcare to its fold in Rs 271.2 crore all-cash transaction - The Economic Times
business.summary: Sun Pharma adds Innovcare to its fold in Rs 271.2 crore all-cash transaction  The Economic TimesSee more headlines and perspectives on Google News

business.title: Jio Platforms plans $3 billion debt reduction from IPO proceeds
business.summary: Jio Platforms is gearing up for its IPO, planning to allocate a significant portion of the funds to repay nearly $3 billion in external commercial borrowings for its telecom arm. This move aims to slash debt, reduce interest expenses, and bolster the company's financial standing. The deleveraging will empower Jio to pursue strategic growth in areas like 5G, broadband, AI, and cloud services, positioning it for future investments and opportunities.

business.title: NSE's Rs 30,000 crore IPO set to spotlight exchange's dominance in Indian markets, dependence on options trading: Zerodha analysis
business.summary: The National Stock Exchange's proposed initial public offering (IPO), expected to raise nearly Rs 30,000 crore through an offer-for-sale, could become India's largest-ever public issue, while also highlighting the exchange's dominant position in the country's capital markets and its heavy reliance on derivatives trading revenues, according to an analysis by Zerodha's Daily Brief.

business.title: Monsoon risk, younger investor base, and skewed trading activity define NSE outlook: NSE data
business.summary: India's 2026 macro outlook will hinge on monsoon performance, while the investor base continues to get younger and more geographically dispersed, and trading activity remains heavily concentrated among large investors, NSE data showed in its latest report.

business.title: Andhra govt inks deal with Canva for visual communication in govt schools
business.summary: Through this partnership, students will gain access to world-class tools that enable them to create presentations, projects, infographics, videos, graphics and other visual learning content

business.title: Unified authority to monitor Periyar river cleanliness important; lives at stake: Keralam HC

business.title: BSE subsidiary ICCL adopts new brand identity as BSE Clearing
business.summary: The company said the transition marks a significant milestone in strengthening alignment with parent entity BSE Ltd and reinforces its role within the broader BSE ecosystem.

business.title: Stock Market Holiday: BSE, NSE closed on June 26 sets up extended weekend for Dalal Street
business.summary: Indian stock markets will observe a trading holiday on June 26 for Muharram. This marks the second exchange closure in under a month, with 16 holidays scheduled for 2026. Following this, markets will reopen on September 14 for Ganesh Chaturthi. Several other holidays are slated for the latter half of the year, concluding with Christmas on December 25. MCX will have a partial closure, while NCDEX will be fully shut.

business.title: Free shares! NSE IPO DRHP reveals curious case of 5,000 shares landing in wrong demat account
business.summary: According to the DRHP, NSE and Nuvama Wealth Finance filed a civil suit before the Delhi High Court against Kashmiri Lal Rana and NSDL in May 2025, alleging that 5,000 NSE shares were mistakenly transferred to Rana's demat account on December 28, 2023, despite no corresponding purchase request or consideration being paid.

business.summary: The state cabinet also approved a 15-day window for eligible residents of older buildings to apply for permanent electricity connections
